zh.lifeSummary: 當William De Dethick III於1374年出生在英國德比夏爾阿福時，他的父親William De Dethick II26歲，母親Margery Frankville22歲。他於1399年與Elizabeth Derham在英國諾福爾可格亞特 可雷辛加姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1467年享年93歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William De Dethick III于1374年出生在英国德比夏爾阿福时，他的父亲William De Dethick II26岁，母亲Margery Frankville22岁。他于1399年与Elizabeth Derham在英国諾福爾可格亞特 可雷辛加姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1467年享年93岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dethick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William De Dethick III was born in 1374, in Ashover, Derbyshire, England, his father, William De Dethick II, was 26 and his mother, Margery Frankville, was 22. He married Elizabeth Derham in 1399, in Great Cressingham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1467, at the age of 93.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William De Dethick III est né en 1374, à Ashover, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, William De Dethick II, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margery Frankville, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Derham en 1399, à Great Cressingham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1467, à l’âge de 93 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William De Dethick III 1374 in Ashover, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William De Dethick II 26 und seine Mutter Margery Frankville 22. Er hat 1399 in Great Cressingham, Norfolk, England Elizabeth Derham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1467 im Alter von 93 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William De Dethick III è nato il nel 1374 nel Ashover, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, William De Dethick II, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margery Frankville, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Derham nel 1399, nel Great Cressingham, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1467, all'età di 93 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William De Dethick IIIが1374年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアショバーで生まれた時，父William De Dethick IIは26歳，母Margery Frankvilleは22歳であった。1399年にイギリスノーフォルクグレアト クレシンガムでElizabeth Derhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1467年に93歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William De Dethick III(이)가 1374년 영국 더비실르 애쇼버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Dethick II(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Frankville(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1399년 영국 노르폴크 그리트 크레징함에서 Elizabeth Derham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1467년 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William De Dethick III nasceu em 1374, em Ashover, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William De Dethick II, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margery Frankville, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Derham em 1399, em Great Cressingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1467, com 93 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William De Dethick III родился в 1374 г. в местности ашовир, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени William De Dethick II было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Frankville, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Derham в 1399 г. в местности грит крессингхам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1467 г. в возрасте 93 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William De Dethick III nació en 1374, en Ashover, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William De Dethick II, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margery Frankville, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Derham en 1399, en Great Cressingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1467, a la edad de 93 años.
